notes: File-input archetype: drag-drop zone for uploading files with optional input button. 10-density sizing (micro...ultra). 6 semantic roles (brand/info/danger/success/warning/neutral) with filled variant.
Modes: dropzone (drag-drop area) and button (upload button). Both share the same size/role styling.
States: default (idle), hover (over zone), disabled, aria-invalid (validation error), drag-over (file dragged over zone).
Roles apply background and text color from semantic palette. On-component text derivation (auto-AA) matches filled button pattern.
Variant: filled is the only structural variant (transparent, tinted, outlined orthogonal variants may be added later if needed).
Min-tap-target enforced on dropzone and button (44px minimum).
